contact.about: At Flash Car, we are a 100% Querétaro company committed to offering a reliable, accessible and high-quality vehicle rental service. We have a large fleet to meet all your needs, whether by day, week or month.
detail.first_rental_driver: ✔ Additional driver included on your first rental
faqs.q1: Why don't I get the exact car model and brand I prefer when I book in advance?
faqs.a1: When you make a reservation, you select a car category, not a specific model. For us, cars are catalogued according to their characteristics in groups. For example, when booking a Group A "Subcompact" car, we commit to delivering one of the 3 models included in that category. Each group may contain several automotive brands and models, all meeting the quality and comfort standards we are committed to with our customers.
faqs.q2: Can I prepay with my credit card and request that the vehicle be delivered to another person?
faqs.a2: For security reasons, the rental holder must also be the credit card holder used for prepayment.
faqs.q3: What is the required credit limit on my card to rent a car?
faqs.a3: To protect the vehicle you will receive, a pre-authorization on your credit card is required, and the amount will be determined based on the liability waiver option you choose.
faqs.q4: Are protections mandatory when renting a car?
faqs.a4: Our liability waivers and protections are 100% optional and additional to the total rental, giving you the freedom to choose among any of our alternatives. Although it is highly recommended for your safety and peace of mind to acquire some type of liability waiver, they are by no means mandatory, and their purchase does not condition the car rental...
